notes: WID-layer plan fragment with parallel wall pairs around ~1600 opening

rationale.evidence: All 53 entities sit on WID with only LINE/LWPOLYLINE. Baseline 1D32 spans ~1510 units, and repeated parallel pairs ~30 apart (1D36/1D37, 1D42/1D43) plus 12-vertex polylines read as wall thickness around an opening named dw1600.
rationale.rule: Width-coded blocks on WID composed of long parallel line pairs at consistent spacing are floor-plan wall/opening fragments, not symbols or furniture.
rationale.counterfactual: Dominant DOOR/ARC swing geometry or FUR/KIT layers would flip this to 심볼 or 가구 and cut wall_likelihood sharply.
rationale.uncertainty: No hatch or adjacent-room context; whether segments are structural wall vs jamb finish is inferred only from spacing and layer name.

notes: Same WID wall/opening pattern as dw1600, stretched to ~2100

rationale.evidence: Identical entity mix and WID layering to dw1600, with bbox x to 2055 and parallel pairs (53C0/53C1, 53CC/53CD) plus baseline 53BC. Geometry is a scaled plan wall fragment for a ~2100 opening.
rationale.rule: Sibling width-module blocks sharing WID parallel-pair topology inherit the same plan-wall-fragment role.
rationale.counterfactual: If the content were a single thin polyline with ARC swing on DOOR, it would be a door 심볼 instead.
rationale.uncertainty: Sampled coords do not prove which side is exterior; wall thickness is clear but material/core type is not.

notes: WID wall/opening fragment oriented for ~2700 span (v variant)

rationale.evidence: WID-only LINE/LWPOLYLINE set mirrors dw* modules: long face 3F24 and parallel pairs (3F28/3F29, 3F34/3F35) with ~30 spacing. Name DW2700v and bbox to 2655 indicate a plan wall opening module.
rationale.rule: Orientation suffix (v) does not change role when layer and parallel wall-pair pattern remain the same.
rationale.counterfactual: Absence of paired parallel faces and presence of CIRCLE/TEXT equipment labels would reclassify away from 평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: v may mean vertical placement or variant; projection alone cannot confirm installation orientation in the host drawing.

notes: Evacuation/exit X marks on 피난구 plus FUR/MC boxes

rationale.evidence: Layers include 피난구 with crossing diagonals (1D70/1D71, 1D74/1D75) and FUR X-lines (1D6E/1D6F)—classic exit/evac symbol graphics, not continuous wall runs. Only 11 entities and mixed FUR/MC/피난구 layers.
rationale.rule: Small blocks dominated by crossed diagonals on exit/evac layers are annotation symbols, not plan geometry.
rationale.counterfactual: Long parallel double lines on WID without X marks would raise wall_likelihood and favor 평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: esp expansion is unknown; whether it marks emergency stair vs refuge area needs host-drawing context.

notes: 13-person elevator plan symbol on ELEV with capacity TEXT

rationale.evidence: TEXT '13인승(피난용)' on DEFTXT and ~45 ELEV entities form a symmetric cab/shaft outline (vertical 7FD2, paired sides 7FD3/7FD4). Name ev13k matches an elevator library block, not a room plan fragment.
rationale.rule: Elevator-named blocks on ELEV with capacity labels are equipment symbols; shaft lines are enclosure graphics, not building walls.
rationale.counterfactual: If geometry were a long corridor of WID parallel pairs without capacity text, role would become 평면 부분도 with high wall_likelihood.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot tell cab vs hoistway wall ownership or fire-rating from projection; shaft lines only weakly resemble architectural walls.

notes: 16-person elevator plan symbol on ELEV

rationale.evidence: TEXT '16인승' plus ELEV-dominated LINE/LWPOLYLINE mirror the ev13k cab/shaft pattern at larger bbox. Clear elevator symbol library member, not furniture or wall module.
rationale.rule: Capacity-labeled ELEV blocks with symmetric shaft outlines classify as 심볼 regardless of passenger count.
rationale.counterfactual: Missing DEFTXT capacity and presence of FUR splines would push toward 가구; WID parallel pairs would push toward 평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: Door opening side and whether outer lines are shaft or guide rails cannot be fixed from sampled handles alone.

notes: Twin 16-person elevator bank symbol (x2) on ELEV

rationale.evidence: TEXT '16인승(비상용)', entity_count 94 (~2x single cab), wide bbox to 3575, and ELEV-heavy content indicate a dual-elevator symbol. Sampled geometry matches one cab of the bank.
rationale.rule: Multiplied elevator packs (x2 in name, roughly doubled entity count) remain 심볼, not plan wall assemblies.
rationale.counterfactual: If the second half were WID corridor walls without ELEV/TEXT, wall_likelihood and role would change.
rationale.uncertainty: Only one cab's lines are sampled; exact twin spacing and shared wall between cars is not fully visible.

notes: Door leaf/swing symbol on DOOR with ARC

rationale.evidence: All 7 entities on DOOR: horizontal leaf lines (7E45/7E49/7E4A), LWPOLYLINEs, and ARC 7E4B. Compact bbox height 100 matches door plan symbol, not wall runs.
rationale.rule: DOOR-layer blocks with ARC swing and short leaf lines are door symbols; those lines are not walls.
rationale.counterfactual: Parallel pairs spanning thousands of units on WID without ARC would be 평면 부분도 walls.
rationale.uncertainty: FSD type (fire/smoke door vs ordinary) and swing direction details need ARC parameters not given in the sample.

notes: Double door symbol on A-DOOR with two ARCs

rationale.evidence: A-DOOR layer only; lines ~1440 long with two ARCs (79FD/79FE) and LWPOLYLINE leafs—standard paired door plan symbol named FSD1500-2.
rationale.rule: A-DOOR/DOOR blocks with ARC count matching leaf count are door symbols, not walls.
rationale.counterfactual: Replacing ARCs with thick parallel WID pairs would flip toward wall fragment classification.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether -2 means two leaves or revision is ambiguous without schedule text.

notes: Small facility/equipment glyph on A06-시설물-설비

rationale.evidence: Five entities on A06-시설물-설비: CIRCLE r=50 plus short parallel lines and LWPOLYLINEs in a ~100x30 bbox—compact MEP/facility mark, not architectural wall.
rationale.rule: Tiny blocks on facility/equipment layers with circle-plus-bar glyphs classify as 심볼.
rationale.counterfactual: Large FUR spline meshes or WID wall pairs would move role to 가구 or 평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: Exact fixture type (drain, cleanout, sensor) cannot be read from geometry alone; name is opaque.

notes: Furniture silhouette: FUR with many ARC/ELLIPSE/SPLINE

rationale.evidence: All 115 entities on FUR; histogram is ARC/ELLIPSE/SPLINE-heavy with only 16 LINE. Tall thin bbox and curved primitives match furniture outline, not walls or doors.
rationale.rule: FUR-layer blocks dominated by arcs/splines/ellipses are 가구 regardless of sparse straight lines.
rationale.counterfactual: If layer were WID with parallel thickness pairs and no curves, role would be 평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: Specific furniture type (chair, plant, fixture) cannot be named from sampled ARC list alone.

notes: Detailed door hardware/leaf hatching on DOOR (~210 short LINEs)

rationale.evidence: All 244 entities on DOOR; dense short LINE swarm (1C12+) and ELLIPSE count indicate door leaf/hardware detailing, bbox ~1010x125 typical of a door symbol named hd1050.
rationale.rule: DOOR blocks whose LINE cloud is short hatch-like segments, not long parallel wall pairs, are door 심볼.
rationale.counterfactual: Few long parallel WID faces without DOOR hatch would indicate wall fragment instead.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether hd means hinged door or hardware detail set is unclear; swing ARC is only 1 and not described.

notes: Gas hob/cooktop: KIT layer with burner CIRCLEs

rationale.evidence: KIT layer with 12 CIRCLEs of burner-like radii (15–82) inside a rectangular frame (1DCD/1DCE) matches a gas hob plan. Name HOBGAS19 confirms kitchen appliance furniture/fixture.
rationale.rule: KIT-layer cooktop blocks with multiple concentric/burner circles are 가구 (fixture), not walls or generic symbols.
rationale.counterfactual: Single abstract CIRCLE on a annotation layer without KIT/hob naming could be a plain 심볼 instead.
rationale.uncertainty: Burner count/layout vs control knobs is guessed from radii; exact product SKU beyond the name is unknown.

notes: Furniture block on FUR with ARC/SPLINE detailing

rationale.evidence: 100 entities all on FUR; ARC/SPLINE-rich with mid-size bbox (~800x440 in large coords). Straight lines like 5F8D are furniture edges, not wall thickness pairs.
rationale.rule: FUR-only curved-heavy blocks at furniture scale classify as 가구.
rationale.counterfactual: WID parallel pairs or DOOR+ARC swing would reclassify to 평면 부분도 or 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: World-coordinate embedding suggests exploded instance coords; piece identity (cabinet vs island) is not readable from sample.

notes: Complex FUR furniture (bath-adjacent) with dense SPLINE/ARC

rationale.evidence: 449/451 on FUR plus 2 on F-BATH; 133 SPLINE + 97 ARC dominate. Tiny sampled LINE segments are curve approximation crumbs, not walls. Name IW990 fits sanitary/furniture library.
rationale.rule: Huge FUR/F-BATH curved meshes are furniture/fixture blocks even if a few F-BATH entities appear.
rationale.counterfactual: If majority layer were WID with long parallel faces, wall_likelihood would rise and role shift.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether IW is washbasin, bathtub, or vanity cannot be fixed from micro-segment samples.

notes: Tile pattern mark: TILE layer, 36 equal CIRCLEs + frame

rationale.evidence: 37 entities on TILE: one 4-vertex LWPOLYLINE frame and 36 identical r=10 CIRCLEs—finish/pattern symbol, no LINE walls.
rationale.rule: TILE-layer grids of equal circles are finish 심볼, never walls or furniture solids.
rationale.counterfactual: Irregular FUR splines filling a solid outline would be 가구; WID parallels would be walls.
rationale.uncertainty: Tile module size in real units and room coverage intent need insertion scale from the host drawing.

notes: Furniture top view on FUR (KH-530S-1 TOP)

rationale.evidence: All 132 on FUR; name explicitly TOP with ARC/SPLINE/LINE mix and furniture-scale bbox (~550x80). Lines are product edges, not architectural wall pairs.
rationale.rule: FUR blocks whose def name includes product code plus TOP are plan furniture views.
rationale.counterfactual: DOOR+ARC without FUR would make it a door 심볼; WID thickness pairs would make it wall fragment.
rationale.uncertainty: Appliance vs cabinet subtype beyond KH-530S-1 string is not visible in geometry samples.

notes: Furniture top view: FUR with SPLINE-dominant mesh

rationale.evidence: 191 entities all FUR; 139 SPLINE dominate with near-degenerate micro LINEs—organic furniture outline. Name L933 TOP marks a top-view furniture definition.
rationale.rule: TOP-suffixed FUR spline-heavy blocks are 가구 plan views.
rationale.counterfactual: Replacement of SPLINEs by DOOR ARC swing or WID parallels would flip role.
rationale.uncertainty: Product category for L933 cannot be inferred from zero-length LINE samples and unnamed splines.

notes: Flagpole site symbol with nested INSERT 국기계양대

rationale.evidence: INSERT of 국기계양대 plus WIPEOUTs and a rectangular LINE frame on layer 0 form a site annotation for a flagpole stand. Not furniture curves, not WID walls.
rationale.rule: Blocks that nest a named ceremonial/site INSERT with wipeout framing are site 심볼.
rationale.counterfactual: Removing the 국기계양대 INSERT and filling with FUR splines would suggest 가구; WID parallel pairs would suggest walls.
rationale.uncertainty: ng abbreviation and whether the rectangle is a raised plinth vs graphic border is ambiguous; wall_likelihood stays low.

notes: 900-wide door symbol on DOOR with X marks and ARC

rationale.evidence: All 19 on DOOR; crossing diagonals (1BF9/1BFA, 1C00/1C01, 1C05/1C06), leaf lines, LWPOLYLINEs, and ARC 1C0A in bbox width 900 match a door plan symbol named pd900.
rationale.rule: DOOR-layer fixed-width blocks with X leaf marks and ARC swing are door 심볼; crossing lines are not walls.
rationale.counterfactual: Long unpaired WID faces without ARC/X would indicate wall fragment with higher wall_likelihood.
rationale.uncertainty: pd may mean pair/pocket/panel door; leaf count and fire rating are not stated in the projection.
